history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man wearing a white short-sleeved collared shirt, grey pants, and a black helmet with a face mask is sitting on a black custom motorcycle. The motorcycle has a sleek, vintage cafe racer style with chrome accents on the handlebars and front suspension. The man has a bracelet on his left wrist and is wearing a ring on his left ring finger. He is positioned in front of a textured, weathered concrete wall that appears to have carved or molded designs resembling tree trunks or abstract organic shapes. The wall is topped with rough stonework and overgrown with green vines and some foliage. In the background, there's a glimpse of a brick chimney and some trees with lush green leaves. The lighting suggests an overcast day, creating soft shadows and a slightly muted color palette dominated by earthy tones, greens, greys, and the black of the motorcycle. The overall mood is casual and perhaps a bit edgy, hinting at a love for motorcycles and a rugged aesthetic. The style is realistic with a focus on detail.
